mbom.title: Model Bill of Materials
mbom.subtitle: Every ML model shipped in the current build — commit SHA, license hash, source, and approver.
mbom.emptyDescription: The current build has no Model Bill of Materials entries yet.
mbom.loadError: Failed to load the Model Bill of Materials.

audit.title: Audit summary
audit.subtitle: Verify the per-tenant audit chain-of-hashes for a specific time window (SC-010).
audit.emptyDescription: Select a tenant and a date range, then click Verify chain.

summary.title: Compliance overview
summary.subtitle: Snapshot of audit, erasure, and RUO claim signals (last 30 days).

chain.verifyingDetail: Recomputing every leaf hash in the window.
chain.emptyDetail: Pick a tenant and a time window, then click Verify chain.
chain.validDetail: Every event in the window chains cleanly back to the previous one.
chain.invalidDetail: The chain breaks at sequence number {{seq}}. Every event at or after this row may have been tampered with.
chain.invalidGuidance: Compare the highlighted row against the S3 Merkle anchor below. The anchor lives in Object Lock (compliance mode) with 6-year retention and cannot be rewritten.

spotCheck.title: RUO spot-check
spotCheck.subtitle: Sample random exported artifacts and confirm each one carries the Research Use Only watermark (SC-009).
spotCheck.emptyDescription: Click Sample to pull a random batch of exported artifacts from this tenant.
spotCheck.nonPdfPlaceholder: Preview not available — open the artifact to verify manually.

claim.title: Regulatory claim registry
claim.subtitle: Per-claim RUO / under conformity assessment / cleared status. Toggling narrows the disclaimer scope for future exports (FR-028b).
claim.deniedTooltip: You do not have compliance.toggle_claim_registry permission.
claim.loadError: Failed to load the claim registry.
claim.emptyDescription: No regulatory claims have been configured for this tenant.
